items.name_cn:
Loє🌟wє Puzzle 660
Brown mixed with brown-yellow small size~
🧱Synchronized with the latest cabinet style
❤️Synchronized with the latest version from the counter, size 24-14-11CM, large capacity, perfect for daily wear and trips!
❤️A color you won't regret buying. 2019 synchronized with the latest counter style. No interface, full leather lining, thin shoulder strap, no studs at the bottom. Made of imported Spanish calfskin 🐄, soft and comfortable to the touch. Precise cutting allows it to fold naturally, can be carried by hand or slung over the shoulder (multiple uses). Removable long shoulder strap, textile lining. Practical, feels great to use! ❤️💋👩👩❤️💋👩👩❤️💋👩

items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟Small Satin Calfskin Puzzle Edge Handbag🌟🆕
items.name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟Small Satin Calfskin Puzzle Edge Handbag🌟🆕
LO℮W℮'s debut handbag*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This monochrome version is made of satin calfskin, featuring matching shiny hardware, matching jacquard strap, and matching ceramic rabbit charm. Inspired by the monochrome glaze of ancient Chinese ceramics. The small Puzzle can hold, for example, a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses. Shoulder*crossbody or clutch*removable adjustable shoulder strap*one internal slip pocket*customizable with shoulder strap and personalized charm*matching herringbone cotton canvas lining
size:24*10.5*16CM
Model:052239

size:24*10.5*16CM
